commons.name: Urban Drainage & Flood Management
commons.description: The shared infrastructure and waterways that protect Eastshire from flooding — drains, culverts, bioswales, and the green corridors that absorb runoff. Whoever is affected by flooding, or works on drainage, belongs here.

commons.name: Vacant Land & Community Reuse
commons.description: Unused lots, brownfield sites, and the waste and fly-tipping that accumulates in neglected spaces — and the question of what these spaces can become when communities take an interest in them.

commons.name: Community Growing Spaces
commons.description: Allotments, community gardens, rooftop growing, and the soil, seed, and knowledge commons that make food growing possible at a neighbourhood scale.

commons.name: Public Cycle Infrastructure
commons.description: Cycle routes, stands, repair stations, and the ongoing negotiation with road and transport planning that shapes whether cycling is safe and accessible for everyone.
